rulings.Case Title: JOEL ELLIOTT VS. MICHAEL GALLIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Declaring Prrevailing Party And The Awarding Of Reasonable Attorney Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, January 9, 2015 line 8. DEFENDANTS MICHAEL GALLIN and AARON MARXMILLER's Motion For Order Declaring Prrevailing Party And The Awarding Of Reasonable Attorney Fees Granted in the amount of $4,000. This award excludes time spent on work performed in conjunction with default, e.g. requests for OST, multiple motions to vacate, request for refund, request for stay; and time spend "consulting with other attorneys." = (501/REQ)
